full_text:
Fu Gu (Lanshi) 傅嘏 (蘭石)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fu Gu (傅嘏), styledLanshi (蘭石). Chair of the Secretariat, he opposed Sima Shi’s invasion of Wu. Fu Gu was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Fu Gu lived during the Later Han Dynasty and Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
